ddls:
CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the report */,
  "reporting_year" TEXT /* Year for which the report is submitted */,
  "date_received" TEXT /* Date the report was received */,
  "received_status" TEXT /* Status of the report (e.g., On time, Overdue, Not submitted) */,
  "download_link" TEXT /* Link to download the report */,
  "entity_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the entity that submitted the report */,
  "report_type_id" INTEGER /* Type of the report */,
  "submission_deadline" TEXT /* Deadline for submitting the report */,
  "report_format" TEXT /* Format of the report (e.g., PDF, Excel, Word) */,
  "report_size" TEXT /* Size of the report in bytes */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the report */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the report was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_entity_id FOREIGN KEY ("entity_id") REFERENCES entities ("entity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_report_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("report_type_id") REFERENCES report_types ("report_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "entities" (
  "entity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each entity */,
  "entity_name" TEXT /* Name of the entity */,
  "entity_type" TEXT /* Type of the entity (e.g., Department, Subsidiary) */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the entity */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the entity */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the entity */,
  "fax_number" TEXT /* Fax number of the entity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("entity_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "report_types" (
  "report_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report type */,
  "report_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the report type (e.g., Annual return, Tax report) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the report type */,
  "report_template" TEXT /* Template for the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "submission_status" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each submission status */,
  "status_name" TEXT /* Name of the submission status (e.g., On time, Overdue) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the submission status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Role of the user (e.g., Admin, Analyst) */,
  "entity_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the entity the user belongs to */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hash of the user's password */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_entity_id FOREIGN KEY ("entity_id") REFERENCES entities ("entity_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., Admin, Analyst) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role (e.g., read, write, delete) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "report_id" INTEGER /* ID of the report being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the report */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_location" TEXT /* Location from where the report was accessed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_report_id FOREIGN KEY ("report_id") REFERENCES reports ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "report_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report version */,
  "report_id" INTEGER /* ID of the report */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the report */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date the version was created */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* Description of the changes in this version */,
  "version_file" TEXT /* File containing the report version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_report_versions_report_id FOREIGN KEY ("report_id") REFERENCES reports ("report_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reminders" (
  "reminder_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reminder */,
  "report_id" INTEGER /* ID of the report the reminder is for */,
  "reminder_date" TEXT /* Date the reminder is set for */,
  "reminder_type" TEXT /* Type of the reminder (e.g., Upcoming, Overdue) */,
  "sent_to" TEXT /* Email or contact information of the recipient */,
  "sent_status" TEXT /* Status of the reminder (e.g., Sent, Not sent) */,
  "reminder_priority" TEXT /* Priority of the reminder (e.g., High, Medium, Low) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reminder_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reminders_report_id FOREIGN KEY ("report_id") REFERENCES reports ("report_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audits" (
  "audit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit event */,
  "report_id" INTEGER /* ID of the report being audited */,
  "changed_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the change */,
  "changed_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the change was made */,
  "change_type" TEXT /* Type of change (e.g., update, delete) */,
  "change_description" TEXT /* Description of the change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audits_report_id FOREIGN KEY ("report_id") REFERENCES reports ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audits_changed_by FOREIGN KEY ("changed_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "report_metadata" (
  "metadata_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metadata entry */,
  "report_id" INTEGER /* ID of the report */,
  "metadata_key" TEXT /* Key for the metadata (e.g., author, date created) */,
  "metadata_value" TEXT /* Value for the metadata */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metadata_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_report_metadata_report_id FOREIGN KEY ("report_id") REFERENCES reports ("report_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "report_comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "report_id" INTEGER /* ID of the report */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the comment */,
  "comment_date" TEXT /* Date when the comment was made */,
  "comment_text" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_report_comments_report_id FOREIGN KEY ("report_id") REFERENCES reports ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_report_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
